notes: EGAT government course at Rajjaprabha Dam (Ratchaprapha Dam), Ban Ta Khun District, Surat Thani — near Khao Sok National Park and Cheow Lan Lake. 18H par 72, opened 2000. GPS confirmed from golfkhaolak.com: 8.9582, 98.8029. Dual pricing confirmed: Thai nationals pay ~500 THB weekday / 1,000 THB weekend; foreigners pay ~1,000 THB (confirmed across multiple aggregators and TripAdvisor reviews from 2019-2023). Caddie ~300 THB, cart ~600 THB available but mandatory status not confirmed. Club rental available (700 THB per set). Phone conflict: +66 77 242562 (most cited), +66 77 240 7405 (1golf.eu), +66 77 240 4705 (fax per 1golf.eu). Using +66 77 242562 as primary. No official website found. Last confirmed operating: 2023 TripAdvisor reviews. Described as 'hidden gem' by multiple sources. Hilly terrain — carts recommended. ~40 km from Surat Thani city, ~670 km from Bangkok by road.

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — foreigner rate. Thai nationals pay ~500 THB weekday per 1golf.eu. Foreigner dual pricing confirmed across multiple sources.

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — foreigner rate; 1golf.eu shows 1,000 THB for weekend (Thai nationals). Foreigner rate likely same or higher.

cart_fee_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — golfasian.com. Hilly course — cart strongly recommended but mandatory status unconfirmed.

phone.note: Conflict: 1golf.eu shows +66 77 240 7405. Using most-cited number as primary.
